help.needHelpDesc: Ntubonye igisubizo ushaka? Itsinda ryacu ryo gufasha rirahari!
help.termsConditionsDesc: Amabwiriza yacu ya serivisi n'amasezerano y'ukoresha
help.tip1: Buri gihe banza wemeze ibyangombwa by'umukozi mbere yo gufata serivisi
help.tip2: Sobanura neza ibyo ukeneye mu butumwa mbere y'isaha y'akazi
help.tip3: Rangiza amafatabuguzi kandi utange ibitekerezo kugira ngo wubake icyizere mu muryango
help.tip4: Ku guhura bwa mbere, koresha ahantu hahurirwa n'abantu kandi hatekanye

1.question: Nafungura konti nte?
1.answer: Fungura Akazek winjize nimero ya telefoni. Uzakira kode y'imibare 6 muri SMS - yinjize kugira ngo wemeze, hanyuma wongereho izina n'itariki y'amavuko urangize kwiyandikisha. Imeyili si itegeko kandi ushobora kuyongeraho nyuma mu mwirondoro wawe. Nta jambo ry'ibanga ushyiraho cyangwa wibuka.

2.question: Naha akazi umukozi utanga serivisi nte?
2.answer: Ku rupapuro Ahabanza, banza urebe ko 'Shaka ubufasha' yatoranyijwe hejuru, hanyuma ushakishe serivisi cyangwa uyishakire mu byiciro n'aho iherereye. Fungura serivisi y'umukozi urebe umwirondoro we, imirimo yarangije, n'ibitekerezo bivuga niba yakongera guhabwa akazi, hanyuma ukande 'Saba kumuha akazi', wongereho inyandiko ngufi y'ibyo ukeneye, maze wohereze. Umukozi abona ubusabe bwawe kandi ashobora kubwemera.

3.question: Itandukaniro riri hagati ya 'Saba kumuha akazi' na 'Vugisha ikigo' ni irihe?
3.answer: Abakozi benshi bashobora guhabwa akazi ako kanya ukoresheje 'Saba kumuha akazi'. Abandi bakozi bashyirwaho n'ikigo gishaka abakozi - serivisi yabo igaragaza 'Vugisha ikigo' aho kuba ubusabe butaziguye. Kanda ho, usobanure ibyo ukeneye, ikigo gisuzume inyandiko yawe hanyuma kikuvugishe ku bijyanye no kukubonera umukozi.

4.question: Nashyira serivisi zanjye ku rutonde nte nk'umukozi?
4.answer: Hindukira kuri 'Shaka akazi' hejuru ku rupapuro Ahabanza, ujye kuri Ibindi -> Serivisi zanjye, ukande 'Ongeraho serivisi'. Uzuza icyiciro, ibisobanuro, igiciro, agace utangamo serivisi n'ifoto, hanyuma ubike - bizagaragara ku mwirondoro wawe kugira ngo abakoresha bakubone.

5.question: Kwishyura bikorwa gute?
5.answer: Akazek ntitunganya ubwishyu muri porogaramu - gusaba guha akazi no kohererezanya ubutumwa ni ubuntu. Muganire ku giciro n'ibikubiye mu kazi n'umukozi mu kiganiro mbere y'uko akazi gatangira, hanyuma umwishyure mubonanye akazi karangiye.

6.question: Nahagarika ifatabuguzi nte?
6.answer: Fungura ikiganiro cyawe n'umukozi kuri ako kazi - uzabona 'Hagarika akazi' mu gice cy'imirimo. Niba ubusabe bugitegereje, ushobora no kubwemera cyangwa kubwanga uhereye ku rupapuro rw'Akazi. Kugeza ubu nta buryo bwo guhindura itariki buhari, bityo niba ukeneye indi tariki, hagarika wohereze ubusabe bushya.

7.question: Kwemeza umukozi bikorwa gute?
7.answer: Abakozi bashobora kohereza indangamuntu yatanzwe na leta bayikuye mu mwirondoro wabo kugira ngo isuzumwe. Itsinda ryacu nimara kuyemeza, ikimenyetso cya 'Byemejwe' kigaragara ku mwirondoro no ku rutonde rwa serivisi, bityo abakoresha bakabaha akazi bizeye kurushaho.

8.question: Bigenda bite iyo umukozi ataje?
8.answer: Banza umwandikire muri porogaramu. Natagusubiza, jya kuri Ibindi -> Tanga ikibazo, usobanure ibyabaye, maze itsinda ryacu ribisuzume rikurikirane.

9.question: Natanga igitekerezo nte?
9.answer: Nyuma y'uko ifatabuguzi rishyizweho ko ryarangiye, uzabazwa niba wakongera guha uwo muntu akazi cyangwa gukorana na we - Yego, Birashoboka, cyangwa Oya - hamwe n'igitekerezo kitari itegeko. Icyo gitekerezo cyo kongera gukorana ni cyo kigaragara ku mwirondoro; nta manota y'inyenyeri atandukanye ahari.

10.question: Nshobora gutanga imyitwarire itari myiza cyangwa itekanye?
10.answer: Yego. Jya kuri Ibindi -> Tanga ikibazo (unabigeraho mu gice cy'imirimo y'ifatabuguzi), hitamo icyiciro, usobanure ibyabaye. Itsinda ryacu rishinzwe umutekano risuzuma buri raporo.

11.question: Nahindura nte hagati y'uburyo bw'Umukoresha n'Umukozi?
11.answer: Hejuru ku rupapuro Ahabanza hari buto ebyiri - 'Shaka ubufasha' na 'Shaka akazi'. Ushobora guhinduranya igihe icyo ari cyo cyose; izo nshingano zombi ziba kuri konti imwe, bityo ntukeneye kongera kwiyandikisha.

12.question: Nahindura cyangwa nsiba nte serivisi iri ku rutonde?
12.answer: Jya kuri Ibindi -> Serivisi zanjye, ushake serivisi ushaka guhindura, ukande ikimenyetso cy'ikaramu kugira ngo uyihindure cyangwa icy'igisanduku cy'imyanda kugira ngo uyisibe. Impinduka zihita zishyirwa mu bikorwa.

13.question: Byagenda bite niba ntashoboye kwinjira cyangwa nibagiwe ijambo ry'ibanga?
13.answer: Akazek ntikoresha amagambo y'ibanga - winjira buri gihe ukoresheje nimero ya telefoni na kode nshya ya SMS. Niba warahinduye nimero ya telefoni, vugana na support@akazek.rw; kwiyandikisha ukoresheje nimero nshya byakora konti itandukanye.

14.question: Amakuru yanjye bwite afite umutekano?
14.answer: Yego. Dukoresha uburyo bwizewe bwo guhisha amakuru kugira ngo turinde amakuru yawe kandi ntitwigera tuyagurisha. Ibyangombwa nk'indangamuntu bikoreshwa gusa mu kwemeza. Reba Politiki yacu y'Ibanga kugira ngo ubone ibisobanuro byose.

15.question: Nasiba konti yanjye nte?
15.answer: Kugeza ubu nta buryo bwo gusiba konti muri porogaramu - ohereza imeyili kuri support@akazek.rw urimo amakuru ya konti yawe, tuzayisiba mu minsi 30. Ibi ntibisubizwa inyuma: serivisi zawe, amafatabuguzi n'ibitekerezo byose bizakurwaho.

savedBookmarks.noSavedServicesDesc: Bika abatanga serivisi ukunda kugira ngo ubagereranye nyuma unafate serivisi vuba igihe witeguye.

reportIssue.descriptionTooShort: Ibisobanuro bigomba kuba bifite nibura inyuguti 10
reportIssue.issueReportedSuccess: Ikibazo cyatanzwe neza. Murakoze kudufasha kunoza serivisi!
reportIssue.issueReportedDesc: Ikibazo cyawe cyatanzwe kandi itsinda ryacu rizagisuzuma vuba.
reportIssue.descriptionPlaceholder: Sobanura ikibazo mu magambo arambuye, harimo ibyabaye n'igihe byabereye

placementReport.typePoorPerformance: Imikorere mibi cyangwa ubuziranenge bw'akazi budahagije
placementReport.reportSubmittedDesc: Ikigo cyamenyeshejwe kandi kizakuvugisha mu masaha 24.
placementReport.subtitle: Ikigo kizamenyeshwa kandi kikuvugishe
placementReport.descriptionPlaceholder: Tanga ibisobanuro ku kibazo kugira ngo ikigo gisubize neza...
placementReport.warningNote: Iyi raporo izoherezwa ako kanya ku kigo gitanga abakozi. Ku bibazo byihutirwa cyangwa impungenge z'umutekano, hamagara ikigo ako kanya.

organizationProfile.pendingVerification: Bitegereje kwemezwa — tuzasuzuma konti yawe vuba.
organizationProfile.howItWorksDesc: Abakiriya bafata serivisi ako kanya na {name}. Itsinda ryawe ni ryo rikora akazi — Akazek ntigenzura buri mukozi ku giti cye ku masosiyete atanga serivisi.

servicesBrowse.refineResultsDesc: Ubwoko bwa serivisi, agace, igiciro, uko kuboneka
servicesBrowse.fetchError: Hari ikitagenze neza mu gushakisha serivisi.
servicesBrowse.noResultsHint: Gerageza guhindura ishakisha ryawe cyangwa muyungurura kugira ngo ubone icyo ushaka.

homeOverview.searchProvidersPlaceholder: Shaka ukoresheje izina ry'utanga serivisi, serivisi, icyiciro...

postJob.jobTitlePlaceholder: urugero: Nkeneye umukozi wo gusukura ku wa gatandatu mu gitondo
postJob.descriptionPlaceholder: Sobanura ibyo ukeneye mu buryo burambuye — ingano y'inzu, umubare w'ibyumba, n'ibindi bisabwa byihariye...

notificationHistory.noNotificationsDesc: Igihe hari ikintu cy'ingenzi kibaye, kizagaragara hano.
notificationHistory.tryAnotherFilter: Gerageza ikindi muyungurura kugira ngo ubone andi matangazo.

notificationSettings.deviceUnsupported: Fungura porogaramu ya Akazek yashyizwe (Add to Home Screen) kugira ngo wemeze amatangazo.
notificationSettings.notificationsBlocked: Amatangazo yarabujijwe. Yemeze mu igenamiterere ya telefoni yawe.
notificationSettings.couldNotEnable: Ntibyashobotse kurangiza kwemeza amatangazo. Ongera ugerageze.
notificationSettings.deviceDescUnsupported: Fungura porogaramu yashyizwe (Add to Home Screen) kugira ngo wemeze amatangazo.
notificationSettings.deviceDescDenied: Byarabujijwe — emerera amatangazo ya Akazek mu igenamiterere ya telefoni yawe.
notificationSettings.deviceDescEnabled: Uzabona amatangazo y'amafatabuguzi, ubutumwa, n'ibitekerezo kuri iyi telefoni.
notificationSettings.deviceDescDisabled: Yemeze kugira ngo ubone amatangazo y'amafatabuguzi, ubutumwa, n'ibitekerezo kuri iyi telefoni.
notificationSettings.chooseUpdatesSubtitle: Hitamo amakuru ya Akazek ushaka kwakira.
notificationSettings.itemNewMessagesDesc: Mumenyeshe igihe umukiriya cyangwa umukozi ohereje ubutumwa
notificationSettings.itemBookingRequestsDesc: Ibyifuzo byemewe n'inyungu nshya ku matangazo y'akazi yawe
notificationSettings.itemBookingUpdatesDesc: Kwemeza, guhagarika, imyanya yuzuye, n'amakuru mashya ku busabe
notificationSettings.itemPaymentUpdatesDesc: Ubwishyu bwakiriwe, butagenze neza, bwasubijwe, cyangwa busaba kwitabwaho
notificationSettings.itemProfileReviewsDesc: Ibitekerezo bishya n'ibisubizo ku bitekerezo wanditse
notificationSettings.criticalNotice: Amatangazo y'ingenzi ku konti, umutekano, n'amafatabuguzi ashobora koherezwa igihe cyose bikenewe kugira ngo konti yawe n'amafatabuguzi akora bibungabungwe.

serviceDetailShared.priceCaption: Igiciro gihindagurika bitewe n'akazi n'ingano yako

serviceDetail.hiringProtectionDesc: Niba uyu mukozi atabashije gukomeza, {agency} yizeza gusimbuza ku buntu mu gihe cy'ingwate.
serviceDetail.rehireQuestion: Waba wongera guha uyu muntu akazi?
serviceDetail.inquiryModalDesc: Ohereza ubutumwa bugufi ku kigo. Bazasuzuma ubusabe bwawe bakugereho kuganira mbere yo kukuha umukozi.
serviceDetail.inquiryPlaceholder: urugero: Ndashaka umurezi w'igihe cyuzuye i Kicukiro, gutangira ukwezi gutaha.
serviceDetail.hireMessagePlaceholder: Sobanura ibyo ukeneye, igihe wifuza, cyangwa ibindi bisabwa byihariye…
serviceDetail.addShortNote: Ongeraho ubutumwa bugufi ku byo ukeneye.
serviceDetail.bookingRequestSentTo: Ubusabe bwo gufata serivisi bwoherejwe kuri {name}!

serviceCard.jobsDoneCount: {count, plural, one {akazi kamwe karangiye} other {imirimo # yarangiye}}

profileScreen.placementOffersDesc: Ibyifuzo by'ikigo byo kugushyira mu kazi
profileScreen.helpAndSupportDesc: Bona ibisubizo cyangwa uvugane n'itsinda rifasha

chatInbox.messagesSubtitle: Ibiganiro byo guha akazi n'amakuru y'akazi
chatInbox.searchEmptyDesc: Gerageza ijambo rindi mu ishakisha cyangwa uhindure muyungurura y'ubutumwa.

login.enterPhoneToLogIn: Andika nimero ya telefoni yawe kugira ngo winjire
login.invalidPhoneNumber: Andika nimero ya telefoni y'imibare 9 iboneye
login.noAccountFound: Nta konti ibonetse ifite iyi nimero. Iyandikishe aho kuba wakwinjira.
login.accountSuspended: Iyi konti yahagaritswe. Vugana n'itsinda rifasha niba ubona ari ikosa.
